title: Veterans launch MoD lawsuit over compensation scheme for LGBT ban
description: Many veterans are currently not eligible for the full payment as they were not formally discharged.
content:
Two military veterans who "suffered enduring harm" due to a ban on LGBT personnel in the armed forces have launched legal action against the Ministry of Defence (MoD).

title: UK veterans ‘forced to resign’ for being gay launch legal action against MoD
description: Steven Stewart and Mark Shephard tell high court LGBT Financial Recognition Scheme is ‘structurally unfair’
content:
Two veterans who were forced to resign for being gay due to a ban on LGBT personnel in the armed forces have launched legal action against the Ministry of Defence (MoD) over a scheme set up to compensate them.

title: Shelly Kittleson: US journalist to be released after kidnap in Iraq, militia says
description: Kataib Hezbollah says the release comes on condition that she leave Iraq immediately.
content:
A US freelance journalist who was kidnapped in the Iraqi capital Baghdad a week ago is to be released, an Iran-backed militia says.
Kataib Hezbollah said on Tuesday it would release Shelly Kittleson, who was taken on 31 March, on the condition that s... [2009 chars]

title: 'Only the president knows' what he will do on Iran, White House says in statement
description: Trump had threatened to target Iranian infrastructure unless Tehran agreed a deal to end the war on Tuesday, saying he was "considering blowing everything up and taking over the oil."
content:
Donald Trump is the only person who knows his plans for Iran, the White House said, after the US president warned that a "whole civilization will die” if Tehran fails to reach a deal Tuesday.
